results.title: The Moral, Practical, Necessary Invigoration of Nuclear Sanity
results.description: Martin Luther King Jr. , when he received the Nobel Peace Prize, reminded us of “The fact that most of the time human beings put the truth about the nature and risks of the nuclear war out of their minds because it is too painful and therefore not ‘acceptable’, does not alter the nature and [...]

results.title: Japan petition takes aim at Trump manga, anime posts
results.description: TOKYO: Almost 20,000 people have signed an online petition in Japan to protest against US President Donald Trump and the White House using manga and anime characters in posts on social media.

results.title: 'It's disrespectful' - Councillor steps in after complaints of state of cemetery
results.description: An Astley Bridge councillor has raised concerns after residents complained about overgrown grass at Astley Bridge Cemetery and difficulties accessing graves.

results.title: Expedite AI-171 crash probe, release final report at earliest, Priyanka Chaturvedi urges Civil Aviation Minister
results.description: New Delhi, June 10 (SocialNews.XYZ) Shiv Sena-UBT leader Priyanka Chaturvedi urged Civil Aviation Minister Kinjarapu Rammohan Naidu to expedite the investigation into the Air India Flight AI-171 crash and make the final report public at... Moving to India post-marriage? Here's how to manage your documents
results.description: Relocating to India after marriage is a big step, and it comes with its own set of challenges, especially when it comes to managing important documents.
